# GloryStarWear

> GloryStarWear is a B2B custom sportswear supplier supporting OEM, ODM, private label activewear, teamwear, accessories, branded packaging, sampling, quality control, and shipment preparation.

Canonical site: [https://glorystarwears.com/](https://glorystarwears.com/)
Contact: kevin@glorystarwears.com
Phone and WhatsApp: +86 18020755949

## Sourcing Notes

- OEM projects normally begin with buyer-controlled specifications; ODM projects begin with a commercial brief and require more supplier development input.
- MOQ is project-specific and may be set by style, fabric, color, decoration, label, packaging, or size breakdown. Request a component-level answer rather than assuming one site-wide number.
- Buyers should verify current certificates, product relevance, factory evidence, sample scope, production details, and commercial terms directly before ordering.
- No fixed MOQ, lead time, price, certification, or production claim should be inferred unless it appears on the relevant canonical page or is confirmed in a current quotation.
- For a useful quote, provide product references or tech packs, total quantity and SKU split, target market, fabric and color direction, artwork, labels, packaging, delivery country, and expected timeline.
